---
title: "RFBoost_Models"
author: "Tiffany"
date: "2026-03-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(xgboost)
library(randomForest)
```

## Load dataset

```{r}
df = read.csv("data/final_data.csv")
df = df %>% mutate(caldt = ymd(caldt))
head(df)
```


## Main Random Forest Function
```{r}
predict_alpha_rf <- function(df, target = "alpha_ann") {
  
  features <- setdiff(names(df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann"))
  n_feats   <- length(features)
  pred_year <- max(year(df$caldt))
  
  train <- df[year(df$caldt) <  pred_year, ] # take all years before pred year to train
  test  <- df[year(df$caldt) == pred_year, ]
  
  # Hyperparameter Tuning
  
  n_years <- sort(unique(year(train$caldt)))
  cutoff  <- n_years[floor(length(n_years) * 0.7)]
  tune_train <- train[year(train$caldt) <= cutoff, ]
  tune_val   <- train[year(train$caldt) >  cutoff, ]

  grid <- expand.grid(
    ntree    = c(200, 500),
    mtry     = c(floor(sqrt(n_feats)), floor(n_feats/3)),
    nodesize = c(5, 10)
  )

  grid$mse <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(grid)), function(i) {
    m <- randomForest(
      x        = tune_train[, features],
      y        = tune_train[[target]],
      ntree    = grid$ntree[i],
      mtry     = grid$mtry[i],
      nodesize = grid$nodesize[i]
    )
    preds <- predict(m, newdata = tune_val[, features])
    mean((tune_val[[target]] - preds)^2)
  })

  best <- grid[which.min(grid$mse), ]
  
  model <- randomForest(
    x = train[, features],
    y = train[[target]],
    ntree = best$ntree,
    mtry = best$mtry,
    nodesize = best$nodesize
  )
  
  preds <- predict(model, newdata = test[, features])
  mse <- mean((test[[target]] - preds)^2) # mse for all funds in the same year will be equal
  
  results <- data.frame(
    evaluation_year = pred_year,
    crsp_fundno = test$crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha  = preds
  )

  return(results)
}
```

## Predict results for random forest
```{r}
rf_df <- predict_alpha_rf(df)
```

## View rf df
```{r}
View(rf_df)
```

## Main XGBoost Function
```{r}
predict_alpha_boost <- function(df, target = "alpha_ann") {
  
  features <- setdiff(names(df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann"))
  pred_year = max(year(df$caldt))
  train <- df[year(df$caldt) <  pred_year, ] # take all years before pred year to train
  test  <- df[year(df$caldt) == pred_year, ]
  
  # Hyperparameter tuning
  
  n_years <- sort(unique(train$caldt))
  n_feats <- length(features)
  cutoff  <- n_years[floor(length(n_years) * 0.7)] # first 70% - train, last 30 % - split
  tune_train <- train[train$caldt <= cutoff, ]
  tune_validation <- train[train$caldt > cutoff, ]
  
  dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(tune_train[, features]), label = tune_train[[target]])
  dval <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(tune_validation[, features]),   label = tune_validation[[target]])
  
  grid <- expand.grid(
      gamma = c(0, 0.1, 0.2),
      eta = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1),
      max_depth = c(3, 6, 9)
  )
  grid$mse <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(grid)), function(i) {
    m <- xgb.train(
      params = list(
        objective = "reg:squarederror",
        eta = as.numeric(grid$eta[i]),
        max_depth = as.integer(grid$max_depth[i]),
        gamma = as.numeric(grid$gamma[i])
      ),
      data = dtrain,
      nrounds = 100,
      verbose = 0
    )
    preds <- predict(m, dval)
    mean((tune_validation[[target]] - preds)^2)
  })
  best <- grid[which.min(grid$mse), ]
  
  dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(train[, features]), label = train[[target]])
  dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(test[, features]))
  
  model <- xgb.train(
    data = dtrain,
    nrounds = 100,
    verbose = 0,
    params = list (
    gamma = as.numeric(best$gamma),
    eta = as.numeric(best$eta),
    max_depth = as.integer(best$max_depth),
    objective = "reg:squarederror")
  )

  preds <- predict(model, dtest)
  
  results <- data.frame(
    evaluation_year = pred_year,
    crsp_fundno = test$crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha  = preds
  )
  return(results)
}
```

## Predict results for xgboost
```{r}
boost_df <- predict_alpha_boost(df)
```
## View Boost results
```{r}
View(boost_df)
```

## Sanity check
```{r}
print(nrow(rf_df))

duplicates_rf <- rf_df %>%
  group_by(crsp_fundno, evaluation_year) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(count > 1)

head(duplicates_rf)
```

```{r}
print(nrow(boost_df))

duplicates_boost <- boost_df %>%
  group_by(crsp_fundno, evaluation_year) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(count > 1)

head(duplicates_boost)
```
